inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Revenue per unit sold. Standard pricing input for margin analysis.

inputs.label: Unit Cost (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of goods sold per unit, including materials, labor, and overhead. Based on standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Sales Volume (units per period)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units sold in the given period. Used to calculate total margin.

inputs.label: Period
inputs.businessContext: Time period for volume and margin calculation. Standard financial reporting periods.

inputs.label: Fixed Costs (per period)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed overhead costs allocated to the product. Based on absorption costing principles.

inputs.label: Variable Costs (per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Variable costs per unit beyond COGS, e.g., shipping, commissions. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Average discount or promotion applied to selling price. Common in retail and B2B pricing.

inputs.label: Return Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units returned. Impacts net revenue and cost. Based on quality and customer satisfaction metrics.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for adjusted margin calculation. Common in decision analysis.

hiddenLossDrivers: discountRate > 0.1 ? 'High discount rate reduces effective price' : ''
suggestedActions: grossMarginPercent < 0.2 ? 'Review pricing strategy or reduce variable costs' : ''
returnRate > 0.05 ? 'Investigate root causes of returns and improve quality' : ''
breakEvenUnits > volume ? 'Sales volume below break-even; consider cost reduction or price increase' : ''
